# AgenticFabWorks

AgenticFabWorks is a Korean web tool hub operated as an independent personal project.
It provides free tools for SKCT practice, job preparation, schedules, finance, and everyday calculations.
The representative service is the SKCT online practice tool.

## Main URLs

- Home: https://agenticfabworks.com/
- SKCT representative service: https://agenticfabworks.com/skct/
- SKCT guide: https://agenticfabworks.com/skct/guide/
- SKCT FAQ: https://agenticfabworks.com/skct/faq/
- Contact: https://agenticfabworks.com/contact/
- Privacy: https://agenticfabworks.com/privacy/
- Terms: https://agenticfabworks.com/terms/
- Live SKCT tool: https://skct.agenticfabworks.com/
- Calendar Circle: https://calendar.agenticfabworks.com/

## Service Summary

The SKCT practice tool is used beside a user's own PDF or E-book. Its free tools include timers, an on-screen calculator, a notepad, a drawing board, and optional personal scoring.
The advanced mode stores sessions, per-question time, wrong-answer reasons, review notes, and growth trends.
It does not provide official SKCT questions, past questions, or copyrighted problem text.
It is not affiliated with SK Group or any official SKCT operator.
The real online exam does not use an OMR sheet. The site's answer record is an optional convenience for scoring personal practice material.

Calendar Circle is a mobile-friendly circular schedule planner. It supports direct time-block adjustment, cascading delays, chronological lists, focus timing, and day, week, and month templates.

## Advertising Principle

Ads are intended for document-like pages such as guides, FAQ, introduction, and policy pages.
Ads are not intended for advanced mode, popup practice windows, chat, archive, or focused practice screens.
